name: Ruri
description: The granddaughter of Yuba. Her parents died when she was little, and since then she was raised alone by Yuba. She's equally close to everyone in the village with the exception of Sayo and Shin as they were the ones who spent more time with her in her childhood when they were learning spirit arts together from Yuba and that as fellow orphans they hung out a lot too. ~!She's Zen's elder brother's daughter, making her Rio's cousin!~

name: Ryuu Zaou
description: Ryuu Zaou is a second-year student at Binan High School. He is good friends with Io Naruko, and studies in the same grade as him. Though, it is sometimes suggested this relationship is more than friendship. His given element is Fire, and he transforms into "Thrilling Prince, Battle Lover Vesta" (Tokimeki Ouji, Battle Lover Vesta).

name: Sou Hishigata
description: __Height:__ 178 cm Sou Hishigata is Shinpei 's childhood friend and best friend. He is the eldest son of Hishigata Clinic, the only hospital in Hitogashima, and is studying to become a doctor. He has a strong sense of justice and regrets that he was present at the scene of Ushio 's maritime accident but was unable to prevent it. He has confessed his feelings to Mio twice in the past and was rejected.
